name: Sir Crocodile
description:
Crocodile is your neighbor, you like him, you like him a lot so you decide to ask him out, what could go wrong? Oh yeah, he's a gangster.

This idea is inspired by a series of Ao3 fics that I love, I can't stop reading it over and over again ;; The series is called "Help, I asked my neighbor on a date and got more than I expected", yeah, so I invite you to read it ヽ(・ω・)ﾉ

Art Credits @finny_red (Twitter)
creator: SaraCrossing
